# NepaCalc - AI Navigation Guide

NepaCalc is a comprehensive suite of online calculators and digital tools specialized for Nepal.

## Core Pages
- Homepage: https://nepacalc.com/
- Directory: https://nepacalc.com/directory/
- Search: https://nepacalc.com/search/

## Categories
- Nepal Specific Tools: https://nepacalc.com/nepal/
- Finance & Tax: https://nepacalc.com/finance/
- Math Tools: https://nepacalc.com/math-tools/
- Converters: https://nepacalc.com/converters/
- Health: https://nepacalc.com/health/
- Engineering: https://nepacalc.com/engineering/
- Market Rates: https://nepacalc.com/market-rates/

## Company & Methodology
- About Us: https://nepacalc.com/about/
- Data Sources & Methodology: https://nepacalc.com/data-policy/
- Editorial Policy: https://nepacalc.com/about/editorial-policy/
- Privacy Policy: https://nepacalc.com/privacy/
- Terms & Conditions: https://nepacalc.com/terms/
- Disclaimer: https://nepacalc.com/disclaimer/
- Contact: https://nepacalc.com/contact/
